LanguageData.DogCollar.label: collier pour chien
LanguageData.DogCollar.description: Un collier pour chien ajusté autour du cou.
LanguageData.Doberkin_AlphaHowl_Hediff.label: aura alpha
LanguageData.Doberkin_AlphaHowl_Hediff.description: Les doberkins alentour sont galvanisés par le hurlement alpha.
LanguageData.Doberkin_AlphaHowl_CommonBuff.label: Boost d'aura alpha
LanguageData.Doberkin_AlphaHowl_CommonBuff.descriptio: Un bonus spécial invoqué par un alpha doberkin.
LanguageData.Doberman_KevlarArmor.label: doberman kevlar armure
LanguageData.Doberman_KevlarArmor.description: A protective piece of doberman kevlar armure and helmet.
LanguageData.Doberman_KevlarArmor.stages.li.label: Armored
LanguageData.Doberman_Protectgear.label: doberman protect gear
LanguageData.Doberman_Protectgear.description: A protective suit of doberman protect gear armure and helmet.
LanguageData.Doberman_Protectgear.stages.li.label: Armored
